global.title: CHINA RECAP: Beijing, Xiaomi test drive, BYD news, and a fresh home battery pilot
global.summary: On today’s totally true episode of Quick Charge, Fred returns from the Beijing Auto Show with a fresh look at the future of the car business, and a test drive in a 2nd generation Xiaomi SU7 does nothing to convince him that China hasn’t just set the bar even higher. more…

global.title: 2027 Chevy Blazer EV drops CCS for Tesla-style NACS port
global.summary: GM is continuing its shift to Tesla’s NACS charging standard, and the 2027 Chevy Blazer EV is next in line. more…

global.title: Tesla Semi: first truck rolls off high-volume production line
global.summary: Tesla has produced the first Semi truck off its new high-volume production line at Gigafactory Nevada, marking a critical milestone for the long-delayed electric truck program. The automaker shared an image of the truck on its official Tesla Semi account on X, confirming volume production is now und

global.title: Ford beats Q1 earnings, raises forecast thanks to $1.3 billion in tariff relief
global.summary: Ford (NYSE: F) reported Q1 2026 earnings after the market closed, beating top and bottom lines due to a $1.3 billion one-time tariff refund and improvements with the Novelis plant recovery. more…

global.title: Rocsys unveils hands-free charging system for robotaxis, raises $13M
global.summary: Rocsys launched the M1, which it calls the world’s first hands-free charging system capable of serving multiple bays in robotaxi depot operations. A single overhead-mounted unit can charge vehicles across up to 10 bays without human intervention. The Dutch-American company also announced a $13 milli

global.title: Rivian is adding 150+ fast chargers at popular LA shopping hubs
global.summary: Rivian is scaling up in Southern California with a big expansion of its Caruso partnership, adding two showrooms and lining up more than 150 fast chargers across some of LA’s busiest retail properties. more…

global.title: Ride1Up Prodigy V2 mid-drive e-bike at new $1,795 low, Anker SOLIX 72-hour flash sale + exclusive bonus savings, Jackery, EGO, more
global.summary: We’ve got some big sales – both long-term and soon-to-end – leading our mid-week Green Deals. Things start with the Ride1Up Spring Into Action Sale with up to $700 e-bike savings across various models, with a notable price cut on the Prodigy V2 Brose Step-Thru Mid-Drive 9-Speed e-bike to a new $1,79

global.title: Here’s our first look at the Hyundai IONIQ 3 standard version [Video]
global.summary: Just over a week after its official debut, Hyundai showcased the IONIQ 3 standard version for the first time. more…

global.title: Tesla Semi hits the port: drayage operator MDB launches 3-week freight pilot
global.summary: MDB Transportation, a Southern California drayage operator, has launched a three-week pilot running a Tesla Semi on active port freight lanes — marking the second port trucking company to put the electric Class 8 truck to work hauling containers. The Compton-based carrier is testing the Semi in one

global.title: BYD’s new Song Ultra EV racks up over 60,000 orders in one month, starting at $22,000
global.summary: BYD launched the Song Ultra EV in China, starting at just under $22,000. The new EV is one of the first to be equipped with its Blade Battery and Flash Charging, enabling recharge times in as little as 5 minutes. In just one month, the electric SUV secured over 60,000 orders. more…
